title: Aemeath Tune Rupture Trail Direct Audit
scope: C0 Tune Rupture mode only; single target

facts: Tune Rupture mode: each party character Tune Interference response damage applies 10 Rupturous Trail stacks.
During Seraphic Duet, nearby target trail stacks are referenced/removed.
Each referenced stack increases the extra Tune Rupture damage multiplier by 4% for 1 second.
C6 raises the stack cap by 30 and is out of C0 scope.
Overdrive grants 2 enhanced Seraphic Duet uses for 30 combat seconds.
Overdrive grants a one-use trail-no-consumption state for 30 combat seconds.
The next Seraphic Duet consumes that no-consumption state but must still calculate its multiplier from current trail stacks.

correct_c0_runtime_rules.gain_trigger: each successfully triggered party Tune Rupture response damage event
correct_c0_runtime_rules.duration_refresh_assumption: refresh full aggregate duration to 30s on each new application; source does not expose per-batch independent expiry
correct_c0_runtime_rules.seraphic_stack_bonus_type: extra Tune Rupture damage multiplier increase

consumption.without_trail_no_cost: remove all current target stacks during Seraphic Duet after snapshotting stack count for the follow-up multiplier
consumption.with_trail_no_cost: do not remove stacks, but consume the no-cost state after this Seraphic Duet; multiplier still uses current stack count

response_order: Tune Break applies Interfered state and scans party responses.
Each response that actually triggers and deals response damage applies +10 trail.
Blocked response cooldowns do not grant trail.
With Aemeath, Mornye, and Lynae all successfully responding, one Tune Break reaches 30 stacks.

current_project_mismatches.issue: no runtime path grants +10 trail per successfully triggered party Tune Rupture response
Seraphic Duet generated packet ignores current trail stacks
trail stacks are not removed when no-cost state is absent
trail_no_cost state is consumed, but current code never uses it to control trail removal because removal is not implemented
Rupturous Trail application is incorrectly marked unresolved/scaffold_only despite workbook row 2844 confirming C0 behavior
forte_enhancement_stacks=2 is a separate correct Overdrive mechanic and must not be replaced by the 30-stack trail system

recommended_state_model.note: Use target/global state rather than treating trail as a purely personal Aemeath buff. Single-target simulator may store one target state.

observation_requirement.reason: The policy must distinguish 0/10/20/30-stack Seraphic Duet opportunities.

out_of_scope: C6 60-stack cap and C6 self-grant behavior
remaining_ambiguity: The workbook states a 30-second duration per application but does not explicitly expose independent expiration per 10-stack batch. Aggregate refresh-to-30s is the minimal single-target implementation.
